message:
Refactor btree cursor, VDBE engine, and MVCC compat layers

Cross-cutting improvements across the btree, VDBE, and MVCC subsystems:

- btree/balance.rs: minor rebalance logic adjustments
- btree/cursor.rs: +20 lines expanding cursor navigation handling
- btree/swizzle.rs: +14 lines improving swizzle registry operations
- core/connection.rs: connection lifecycle management refinements
- mvcc/compat.rs: compatibility layer adjustments for version handling
- mvcc/conflict_model.rs: minor conflict classification fix
- mvcc/index_regen.rs: simplified index regeneration path (-10 lines)
- pager/pager.rs: pager state management improvements
- types/opcode.rs: minor opcode metadata adjustment
- vdbe/codegen.rs: codegen tweak for instruction emission
- vdbe/engine.rs: -65 lines simplifying execution paths and reducing
  redundant state tracking in the VDBE interpreter
- vfs/unix.rs: Unix VFS file handling adjustments

Note: arc_cache.rs deletion excluded pending review.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
